steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence: "Octopuses use two halves of a seashell to provide protection or a place to hide." The sentence appears right after the general claim that "other animals also find tools helpful."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "It explains that humans use tools for many different tasks.": The sentence is about octopuses, not humans. ✗
  • Choice B — "It argues that octopuses use tools more often than other animals do.": No comparison of frequency is made. ✗
  • Choice C — "It provides one example of tool use in a nonhuman animal.": Exactly right — it gives one specific instance (octopuses + seashells) to back up the general claim. ✓
  • Choice D — "It emphasizes that octopuses are smarter than birds.": No ranking of intelligence is made. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
